top3.sql:
SELECT 
    r3.url AS third_page,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM read_log r1
JOIN read_log r2 ON r1.session = r2.session AND r2.stamp > r1.stamp
JOIN read_log r3 ON r2.session = r3.session AND r3.stamp > r2.stamp
WHERE r1.url = '/detail'
  AND r2.url = '/detail'
  AND r3.url != '/detail'
GROUP BY r3.url
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    r3.url AS third_page,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM read_log r1
JOIN read_log r2 ON r1.session = r2.session AND r2.stamp > r1.stamp
JOIN read_log r3 ON r2.session = r3.session AND r3.stamp > r2.stamp
WHERE r1.url = '/detail'
  AND r2.url = '/detail'
  AND r3.url != '/detail'
GROUP BY r3.url
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    r3.url AS third_page,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM read_log r1
JOIN read_log r2 
    ON r1.session = r2.session 
    AND r2.stamp = (
        SELECT MIN(r2_inner.stamp) 
        FROM read_log r2_inner 
        WHERE r2_inner.session = r1.session 
          AND r2_inner.stamp > r1.stamp 
          AND r2_inner.url = '/detail'
    )
JOIN read_log r3 
    ON r2.session = r3.session 
    AND r3.stamp = (

final.sql:
SELECT 
    r3.url AS third_page,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM read_log r1
JOIN read_log r2 ON r1.session = r2.session AND r2.stamp > r1.stamp
JOIN read_log r3 ON r2.session = r3.session AND r3.stamp > r2.stamp
WHERE r1.url = '/detail'
  AND r2.url = '/detail'
  AND r3.url != '/detail'
GROUP BY r3.url
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 3;
